notes: All records are synthetic and generated for product demonstration.
Each applicant bundle includes profile metadata, realistic chat timeline, form field updates, and document links.
No real student PII is included.

profile.background_summary: First-generation first-year student balancing school and part-time fast-food work.
profile.current_address: 1948 S Kedzie Ave Apt 3, Chicago, IL 60623

document_bundle.title: Fast Food W-2 (Copy B)
body_lines: Uploaded from Android camera at 11:42 PM in low bedroom lighting.
Top-right corner is clipped and text is slightly smeared.

document_bundle.title: Household Note (Handwritten)

structured_fields.note_text: Me, my mom Tanya Johnson, and my little sister Aaliyah (age 10)

body_lines: Written on notebook paper and photographed on kitchen table.
Coffee ring in lower-left area.

document_bundle.title: The Uni V1 Verification Worksheet (Draft)
body_lines: Sections completed from chat: Student info, household size, earned income.
Escalated to advisor for SSDI untaxed income policy confirmation.

chat_conversation.speaker: student
chat_conversation.message: The Uni says I have a hold and need a V1 Verification Worksheet. I do not know what that is.

chat_conversation.speaker: ai
chat_conversation.message: You are okay, Marcus. Your classes are safe. I opened your V1 worksheet and we can do this together. Who lives in your household right now?

chat_conversation.speaker: student
chat_conversation.message: Just me, my mom, and my little sister.

chat_conversation.speaker: ai
chat_conversation.message: Got it. I entered household size as 3. Is your sister under 13, and is your mom working this year?

chat_conversation.speaker: student
chat_conversation.message: Yes, my sister is 10. My mom does not work because of disability.

chat_conversation.speaker: ai
chat_conversation.message: Thanks. Did you work in 2025? If yes, snap your W-2 and upload it here.

chat_conversation.speaker: student
chat_conversation.message: Yes, I worked at BrightBurger. Uploading W-2 and my handwritten note now.

chat_conversation.speaker: ai
chat_conversation.message: I read your W-2. Wages are $8,412.37 from BrightBurger and federal withholding is $282. I filled the income section.

chat_conversation.speaker: student
chat_conversation.message: The form asks for untaxed income. Does my mom's disability check count?

chat_conversation.speaker: ai
chat_conversation.message: Great question. I am pulling in Sarah, a human advisor, so you get the policy answer right away.

metadata.handoff_summary: Worksheet mostly complete; pending policy treatment of parent SSDI as untaxed income.

chat_conversation.speaker: advisor
chat_conversation.message: Hi Marcus, I am Sarah. Thanks for staying with us. SSDI can count in specific untaxed lines, and I will place it correctly.

chat_conversation.speaker: student
chat_conversation.message: It is around $990 each month.

chat_conversation.speaker: advisor
chat_conversation.message: Perfect, that is $11,880 annual. I entered it and checked the advisor review box.

chat_conversation.speaker: ai
chat_conversation.message: I attached your updated worksheet draft. Review and sign once you are ready.

chat_conversation.speaker: student
chat_conversation.message: I signed it. Thank you for not making this scary.

chat_conversation.speaker: advisor
chat_conversation.message: Signed packet received. Your hold will clear after processing. You will stay enrolled.

demo_hook.title: Step-by-step V1 auto-fill plus empathetic escalation
demo_hook.heart_moment: AI reassures Marcus classes are safe, then escalates immediately when policy complexity appears.

chat_conversation.message: La FAFSA pide impuestos de mis padres, pero no hablo con ellos desde hace cinco anos.

chat_conversation.speaker: student
chat_conversation.message: 8810 Liberty View Dr Apt 5C, Orlando Florida 32821.
chat_conversation.translated_message_en: 8810 Liberty View Dr Apt 5C, Orlando Florida 32821.

chat_conversation.speaker: ai
chat_conversation.message: Gracias. Ya complete la informacion independiente. Ahora necesito dos cartas de apoyo de profesionales.
chat_conversation.translated_message_en: Thank you. I completed your independent student information. Now I need two professional support letters.

form_updates.new_value: 8810 Liberty View Dr Apt 5C, Orlando, FL 32821

chat_conversation.speaker: student
chat_conversation.message: Subi carta de mi terapeuta, carta de mi arrendador y mi utility bill.
chat_conversation.translated_message_en: I uploaded my therapist letter, my landlord letter, and my utility bill.

chat_conversation.speaker: ai
chat_conversation.message: Excelente. Ya extraje los nombres y telefonos de tus referencias. Ahora necesito como te mantienes economicamente.
chat_conversation.translated_message_en: Excellent. I extracted your references and phone numbers. Now I need to know how you support yourself financially.

chat_conversation.speaker: student
chat_conversation.message: Trabajo por horas en construccion, pago renta, comida y transporte yo solo.
chat_conversation.translated_message_en: I work hourly in construction and I pay rent, food, and transportation by myself.

chat_conversation.speaker: ai
chat_conversation.message: Gracias. Cuanto pagas de renta al mes y desde cuando vives sin apoyo familiar?
chat_conversation.translated_message_en: Thank you. How much rent do you pay monthly and since when have you lived without family support?

chat_conversation.speaker: student
chat_conversation.message: Pago $1,050 por mes y llevo cinco anos sin apoyo de ellos.
chat_conversation.translated_message_en: I pay $1,050 per month and I have had no support from them for five years.

chat_conversation.speaker: ai
chat_conversation.message: Perfecto. Traduzco tu historia a ingles formal para la seccion Separation Details.
chat_conversation.translated_message_en: Perfect. I will translate your story into formal English for the Separation Details section.

form_updates.new_value: Student reports five-year estrangement, self-support through hourly construction work, and no parental contact.

chat_conversation.speaker: student
chat_conversation.message: Necesito reporte policial para aprobar esto?
chat_conversation.translated_message_en: Do I need a police report for this to be approved?

chat_conversation.speaker: ai
chat_conversation.message: No necesariamente. Tus dos cartas profesionales y evidencia de domicilio normalmente son suficientes para revision inicial.
chat_conversation.translated_message_en: Not necessarily. Your two professional letters and address evidence are usually enough for initial review.

chat_conversation.speaker: student
chat_conversation.message: Entonces sigamos. Quiero enviarlo hoy.
chat_conversation.translated_message_en: Then let's continue. I want to submit it today.

chat_conversation.speaker: ai
chat_conversation.message: Listo. El borrador esta preparado para envio y ya inclui tus referencias, direccion y declaracion traducida.
chat_conversation.translated_message_en: Done. The draft is ready for submission with your references, address, and translated statement included.

chat_conversation.speaker: student
chat_conversation.message: Gracias por explicarlo sin palabras complicadas.
chat_conversation.translated_message_en: Thank you for explaining this without complicated words.

chat_conversation.speaker: ai
chat_conversation.message: Siempre. Si la oficina pide algo extra, te aviso aqui en espanol y en ingles.
chat_conversation.translated_message_en: Always. If the office asks for anything else, I'll notify you here in Spanish and English.

demo_hook.title: Spanish-first dependency override auto-fill
demo_hook.heart_moment: AI removes language and jargon barriers while preserving trauma-informed process.

chat_conversation.translated_message_en: Great. I entered annual cost as $13,680. Now upload your daycare invoice.

chat_conversation.speaker: student
chat_conversation.message: ਇਨਵੌਇਸ ਅਤੇ ਮੇਰੇ spouse ਦੀ paystub ਫੋਟੋ ਅਪਲੋਡ ਕਰ ਦਿੱਤੀ ਹੈ।
chat_conversation.translated_message_en: I uploaded the invoice and my spouse's paystub photo.

chat_conversation.speaker: ai
chat_conversation.message: ਵਧੀਆ। ਮੈਂ ਡੌਕੂਮੈਂਟ ਪੜ੍ਹ ਕੇ ਫਾਰਮ ਵਿੱਚ ਜੋੜ ਦਿੱਤੇ ਹਨ। ਕੀ ਬੱਚਾ ਹਫ਼ਤੇ ਵਿੱਚ 5 ਦਿਨ ਡੇਅਕੇਅਰ ਜਾਂਦਾ ਹੈ?
chat_conversation.translated_message_en: Great. I parsed the documents and added them to the form. Does your child attend daycare 5 days a week?

chat_conversation.speaker: student
chat_conversation.message: ਹਾਂ, ਸੋਮਵਾਰ ਤੋਂ ਸ਼ੁੱਕਰਵਾਰ ਤੱਕ ਜਾਂਦਾ ਹੈ।
chat_conversation.translated_message_en: Yes, Monday through Friday.

chat_conversation.speaker: ai
chat_conversation.message: ਧੰਨਵਾਦ। spouse ਦੀ ਆਮਦਨ ਦੋ ਹਫ਼ਤਿਆਂ ਵਿੱਚ ਆਉਂਦੀ ਹੈ, ਠੀਕ?
chat_conversation.translated_message_en: Thank you. Your spouse income is biweekly, correct?

chat_conversation.speaker: student
chat_conversation.message: ਹਾਂ, biweekly ਹੈ।
chat_conversation.translated_message_en: Yes, it is biweekly.

chat_conversation.speaker: ai

chat_conversation.speaker: student
chat_conversation.message: ਇਹਨੂੰ ਕਿੰਨਾ ਸਮਾਂ ਲੱਗੇਗਾ?

chat_conversation.speaker: ai

chat_conversation.translated_message_en: I set your status to US Citizen, added your Selective Service number, and AGI as $19,760.

chat_conversation.speaker: student
chat_conversation.message: Trè byen. Mwen konprann pi byen kounye a.
chat_conversation.translated_message_en: Very good. I understand much better now.

chat_conversation.speaker: ai
chat_conversation.message: Fòm nan fini. Mwen mete yon rezime an kreyòl ak angle pou ou revize.
chat_conversation.translated_message_en: The form is complete. I added a summary in Creole and English for your review.

profile.background_summary: Military spouse managing relocation while finishing degree.

required_forms: Consortium Agreement and Benefit Coordination Form

document_bundle.title: Spouse PCS Orders (Excerpt)
body_lines: Student requests remote consortium accommodations due relocation orders.

document_bundle.title: DEA Chapter 35 Eligibility Letter
body_lines: Used to coordinate institutional aid packaging with VA educational assistance.

document_bundle.title: Current Term Tuition and Fee Statement
body_lines: Provides net balance used in consortium and payment-planning sections.

document_bundle.title: Household Budget Notes (Mobile Photo)
body_lines: Photo of handwritten budget notes to support consortium planning.
Used to contextualize relocation cash-flow constraints.

chat_conversation.speaker: student
chat_conversation.message: زوجي عنده أوامر نقل عسكري وأنا عندي مزايا Chapter 35. هل ممكن أحافظ على باقة المساعدات؟
chat_conversation.translated_message_en: My spouse has military transfer orders and I have Chapter 35 benefits. Can I keep my aid package stable?

chat_conversation.speaker: ai
chat_conversation.message: نعم. فتحت نموذج التنسيق بين Consortium ومزايا Chapter 35 وأدخلت بياناتك الأساسية.
chat_conversation.translated_message_en: Yes. I opened the consortium and Chapter 35 coordination form and entered your basic profile.

chat_conversation.speaker: student
chat_conversation.message: رفعت أوامر النقل، خطاب VA، وكشف الرسوم الحالي.
chat_conversation.translated_message_en: I uploaded PCS orders, VA letter, and current tuition statement.

chat_conversation.speaker: ai
chat_conversation.message: استخرجت تاريخ النقل 2026-05-01، ومبلغ Chapter 35 الشهري $1,536، والرصيد الحالي $2,190.
chat_conversation.translated_message_en: I extracted relocation date 2026-05-01, Chapter 35 monthly amount $1,536, and current balance $2,190.

chat_conversation.speaker: student
chat_conversation.message: طيب كم يوم تحتاج الموافقة؟
chat_conversation.translated_message_en: Okay, how many days will approval take?

chat_conversation.speaker: ai
chat_conversation.message: عادة 3 أيام عمل. سأجهز لك ملخصًا للمراجع حتى لا تعيدي الشرح.
chat_conversation.translated_message_en: Usually 3 business days. I will prepare a reviewer summary so you do not have to repeat anything.

chat_conversation.speaker: student
chat_conversation.message: وهل بدل السكن من VA يؤثر على المنحة؟
chat_conversation.translated_message_en: Does VA housing stipend affect the grant?

chat_conversation.speaker: ai
chat_conversation.message: سأحول هذا السؤال لمستشار مختص للتأكيد الرسمي، وأرفق له كل التفاصيل الآن.
chat_conversation.translated_message_en: I will route this question to a specialist advisor for official confirmation, and attach all details now.

metadata.handoff_summary: Consortium form drafted; confirm treatment of VA housing stipend with institutional grants.

chat_conversation.speaker: advisor
chat_conversation.message: مرحبًا فاطمة، أنا المستشار عمر. راجعت الملخص وسأؤكد لك السياسة خلال دقائق.
chat_conversation.translated_message_en: Hi Fatima, I am Advisor Omar. I reviewed the summary and will confirm policy in a few minutes.

chat_conversation.speaker: student
chat_conversation.message: شكرًا، هذا ممتاز.
chat_conversation.translated_message_en: Thank you, that's excellent.

chat_conversation.speaker: advisor
chat_conversation.message: تم التأكيد: بدل السكن لا يلغي المنحة تلقائيًا. أدخلت الملاحظة الرسمية في الملف.
chat_conversation.translated_message_en: Confirmed: housing stipend does not automatically cancel the grant. I added the official note to your file.

form_updates.new_value: VA housing stipend reviewed; no automatic grant cancellation.

chat_conversation.speaker: ai
chat_conversation.message: الآن الملف كامل. سأرسله لمنسق الـ Consortium للموافقة النهائية.
chat_conversation.translated_message_en: Now the file is complete. I will send it to the consortium coordinator for final approval.

chat_conversation.speaker: student
chat_conversation.message: ممتاز، أكملي الإرسال.
chat_conversation.translated_message_en: Great, proceed with submission.

chat_conversation.speaker: ai
chat_conversation.message: تم الإرسال بنجاح. ستصلكِ رسالة متابعة خلال 72 ساعة.
chat_conversation.translated_message_en: Submitted successfully. You will receive a follow-up message within 72 hours.

chat_conversation.speaker: advisor
chat_conversation.message: إذا وصلتك أي رسالة غير واضحة، أرسليها هنا وسأشرحها بالعربية.
chat_conversation.translated_message_en: If you receive any unclear message, send it here and I will explain it in Arabic.

profile.background_summary: First-year student athlete with parent non-filer verification complexity.
profile.current_address: 5219 Martin Luther King Jr Blvd Apt 14, Houston, TX 77021

document_bundle.title: IRS Verification of Non-Filing Letter
body_lines: Used in V1 verification for parent non-filer status.

document_bundle.title: Parent Handwritten Business Ledger (Phone Photo)
body_lines: Notebook photo with uneven lighting and partial corner crop.
Amounts conflict with prior FAFSA estimate.

document_bundle.title: Income Verification Worksheet (Partially Completed)
body_lines: Student entered preliminary values manually before chat.
Bot must reconcile conflicting numbers with ledger evidence.

document_bundle.title: Income Discrepancy Handoff Note
body_lines: Bot completed all deterministic fields and escalated reconciliation decision to human advisor.
Includes concise summary for rapid handoff.

chat_conversation.speaker: student
chat_conversation.message: My coach said I still have a verification hold. We filed non-filing but now they want income proof.

chat_conversation.speaker: ai
chat_conversation.message: I opened your V1 income reconciliation form and imported your partial worksheet.

chat_conversation.speaker: student
chat_conversation.message: Uploading IRS non-filing letter and my dad's notebook ledger.

chat_conversation.speaker: ai
chat_conversation.message: I extracted an estimated parent net income of $18,900 from the ledger, which conflicts with $12,000 on your worksheet.

chat_conversation.speaker: student
chat_conversation.message: I do not know which number is right. I am worried I will be dropped.

chat_conversation.speaker: ai
chat_conversation.message: You will not be dropped for asking for help. I am bringing in an advisor now with a full summary so you do not repeat anything.

chat_conversation.speaker: advisor
chat_conversation.message: Hi Andre, I am Miguel. I reviewed the handoff note and we can reconcile this quickly on a 5-minute call.

demo_hook.title: Discrepancy detection with human safety net
demo_hook.heart_moment: AI auto-fills everything deterministic and escalates exactly where human judgment is needed.
